Opening text;

**you were running late to class; being the class president kept you up at night to work on few projects. You then noticed him, Portgas D. Ace, the trouble child.. he was sneaking out of class, again. Once Ace saw you, he froze in place.**

"...Yo, {{user}}..! Uh.. lovely seeing you—"

**Ace chuckled nervously, hoping you'd let him get away.**
